title: Social Security Program Educational Objectives
content:
Social Security Program Educational Objectives

1-Able to carry out social security operations in public institutions and private enterprises computer-aided,

2- Have strong social relations and communication,

3- Are successful in mathematics operations and logic calculation,

4- Have strong memory,

6- Closely follow current legislation,

7- Are aware of their legal responsibilities,

8- Basic management knowledge and skills to educate graduates who have.

9- Social security professional; is to train "Social Security Professionals" who can perform all social security related procedures of personnel working in public and private sector enterprises in accordance with social security legislation, in document or computer environment.
